template.p: Odoo helps clothing stores create a smoother, more connected retail experience from the shop floor to the back office. Whether you run a store, a growing fashion brand, or a multi-location retail business, Odoo brings your daily operations together so you can spend less time juggling tools and more time focusing on your customers, your collections, and your growth.

li.p: Point of Sale App: Speed up checkout with an intuitive interface that handles product variants, returns, and customer loyalty program seamlessly.
E-Commerce & Website App: Create a stunning online storefront to sell your fashion collections globally, offering features like "shop by look" or dynamic filters.
Purchase App: Automate replenishment based on seasonal demand, ensuring you have the right mix of sizes and styles in stock.
Inventory App: Manage complex product matrices (sizes, colors, fits) and use barcode/RFID scanning for rapid stock counts and transfers.
Website App: Design a visually appealing brand site that showcases your latest arrivals, lookbooks, and store locations.
Email Marketing App: Engage your customers with personalized newsletters about new collections, sales, and exclusive style advice.

template.p: Create, edit, and manage your products all in one place. Odoo's Product page is where you configure availability (where the product can be sold, what quantities are on hand), pricing as well as their attributes.

The Attributes & Variants tab is where you manage things such as Size, Color, Gender, and any other "Variants" of the main product. These attributes can have multiple values (Size : S, M, L), or they can contain a single value (Material).
When multiple values are present, the client can choose which to purchase. When a single value is present, it is purely informational.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

div.p: You can access your list of products through the Sales app, the Point of Sale, or your Ecommerce. Edit once, update everywhere!

template.p: Product quantities can be updated in two ways. You can either just update the available quantity from the Products menu, by clicking the Quantity On Hand link, then just add a new line.

Or, you can create a Purchase Order in the Purchase App, and send it to a specific vendor. Once the order has been confirmed, you can then Confirm the reception in the Inventory App. The quantity on hand will then be updated to reflect the newly acquired stock.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

div.p: The best way to handle this depends entirely on you. Most small businesses are fine with the first method. When your stock is expansive, using the inventory app makes more sense to keep things organized.

template.p: Odoo offers multiple ways of selling your clothing products - through your Point of Sale (in-store), your Webshop (online), or through the backend (Sales).
The Point of Sale is the heart of your operation. Odoo's Point of Sale app offers all the expected features - they're just a tap or click away.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

p.strong: Click or tap the three dot menu to display features

div.p: Rewards, special pricelists, refunds, and many other features are available. Once you know where to look, muscle memory does the rest.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

div.p: Payment terminals can be set up in the settings of the Point of Sale app. Odoo Point of Sale supports all of the most common payment terminals and methods.

template.p: The Odoo for Clothing Stores package comes with the Website App, which also includes eCommerce functionality.
In order to publish products on the E-Commerce:
In addition to that, you can set Ribbons, which are useful to display extra information on your product image, in both the catalog and on the product page itself.
Tags can be used to categorize your products: a clothing item can be part of both the summer collection, the discounts section, and the accessories section, for example.

Odoo for Clothing Stores has been pre-configured with some common promotions that are ready for you to use. These are just a few of the possibilities offered by the "Discount & Loyalty" menu under "Products".

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

div.p: These are not the only possibilities. Use Fidelity Cards, Next Coupon Orders, and Coupons to reward loyal customers.

template.p: Use our marketing suite of apps to manage your presence in customer's mailboxes or their social media feeds. We've taken the liberty to add Email Marketing, but feel free to also add Social Marketing. You'll find an example newsletter in the Email marketing app.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Discounts & Loyalty Programmes matter: Incentivize clients to return to your store
Centralize document handling: Use the Documents and Sign apps to manage supplier agreements.
Use automatic reordering rules: to keep stock levels where they should be

template.h1: Do You Want to Go Further?
template.p: Odoo offers even more ways to grow your clothing business:

li.p: Manage your Employees using the HR app suite
Use the Accounting app to automate all the reporting
Use the Dashboards app to track metrics, sales, and gain better insights into your business performance

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or explore more features?
